tools.name: scan_path
tools.description: Scan a local directory with all defensive scanners (secrets, obfuscation, dependencies, filesystem, Dockerfile, IaC, optional YARA) and store findings in the shared index.

tools.name: report_findings
tools.description: Return findings from the shared index, optionally filtered by severity or scanner.

tools.name: explain_finding
tools.description: Plain-language remediation guidance for a single finding fingerprint.

tools.name: show_charter
tools.description: Return the active Mythos constitution and its fingerprint.
